content: {"cards": [{"name": "Steadfast Sentinel", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"My watch begins at dawn and ends at dusk. Then it begins again.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla creature testing restraint. 2/4 for 3 mana follows the P+T \u2264 CMC+3 rule (2+4=6, 3+3=6). Defensive stats fit white's protective nature. High toughness over power encourages blocking and board stalls that white enjoys."}, {"name": "Dawnwing Protector", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Bird Soldier", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "The first light of dawn reveals both hope and the enemy's approach.", "power": "1", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Single keyword creature testing flying implementation. 1/2 flying for 2 mana is appropriately costed - small flying creatures are white's domain. Stats are conservative to avoid overpowering common flyers that can be hard to interact with in limited."}, {"name": "Purifying Light", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "\"Evil cannot hide from the dawn's first rays.\" \u2014Lyra, Temple Guardian", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's primary removal at uncommon. Exile fits white's color pie better than destroy. Mana value restriction keeps it from being overpowered while still hitting most threats in limited. Cost is efficient but not broken - unconditional exile at this cost would be too strong."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card, then scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge flows like water to those who know where to look.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip testing draw templating. Draw first, then scry follows standard templating. Scry 1 is the right power level for common - provides card selection without being overwhelming. This replaces itself while providing minor card selection, perfect for blue's card advantage philosophy."}, {"name": "Dispel Mastery", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target instant or sorcery spell. Its controller may draw a card.", "flavor_text": "\"I'll stop your spell, but I'm not unreasonable about it.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Counterspell variant testing stack interaction wording. 'Its controller may draw a card' provides a drawback to balance the low cost. Uses proper targeting language for spells on the stack. The optional draw makes it less punishing while still providing the control blue wants."}]}
